question.text: Within how many days of the succeeding month must Mutual Funds disclose investor complaint details on their website and AMFI website?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Mutual Funds shall disclose on their websites and on the AMFI website within 7 days of the succeeding month details of investor complaints received from all sources. **The Trap:** 10 days is for portfolio disclosure, not complaint disclosure. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Complaint data must also be included in the Report of the Trustees as part of the Annual Report.
